goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit receipt record audit receipt artifact builder for cockpit patch consume execution without durable receipt writes, patch application, server/route mutation, permit consumption, or executable actions.
scope_out: Do not write receipts or audits durably, perform durable persistence, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Cockpit audit receipt record audit receipt authority artifacts can be recorded in memory.
Recorded-at ref and evidence ref are required.
Receipt writes, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and executable actions remain false.
assumptions: Durable receipt persistence and receipt record creation require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing evidence, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Receipt write, durable audit write, durable persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, executable action, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-211 authorized cockpit audit receipt record audit receipts without recording or writing them.
